sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: DIPS Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:DIPS
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview of the YieldMax Short NVDA Option Income Strategy ETF (DIPS), including its current price, performance metrics, and key statistics like AUM and dividend yield. It explains DIPS's strategy of pursuing monthly income and inverse exposure to Nvidia stock through a synthetic covered put strategy using options. The fund does not directly invest in NVDA stocks but uses call and put options and short-term US Treasury securities.

feed.title: Rhinebeck Bancorp, Inc. Hits New 52-Week High at $16.44
feed.summary: Rhinebeck Bancorp, Inc. has reached a new 52-week high of $16.44, representing a 110.25% increase over the past year, significantly outperforming the S&P 500. The regional bank has a market capitalization of $169 million, a return on equity of 7.34%, and a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.00, demonstrating strong performance and a conservative financial approach. This milestone highlights the company's notable growth and resilience within the regional banking sector.

feed.title: Workforce Development in Action: Sands Employs a Holistic Well-Being Approach to Support Team Member Advancement
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands is committed to a holistic approach to employee well-being, evidenced by their 2025 Wellness Challenge and various regional initiatives. These programs focus on physical, mental, social, and financial health, aiming to support team member advancement and foster a positive work environment. Sands' efforts include fitness activities, health screenings, stress-release workshops, and family-oriented events, indirectly benefiting nearly 100,000 people.

feed.title: MFS Investment Grade Municipal Trust (NYSE:CXH) Declares Monthly Dividend of $0.03
feed.summary: MFS Investment Grade Municipal Trust (NYSE:CXH) announced a monthly dividend of $0.034 per share, payable on March 31st to shareholders of record on March 17th. This dividend represents a 5.0% yield, with the ex-dividend date set for March 17th. Several institutional investors, including Bulldog Investors LLP and Rivernorth Capital Management LLC, have recently adjusted their holdings in CXH.

feed.title: Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) Price Target Raised to $680.00 at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) to $680.00 from $620.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, though this implies a slight downside. Other analysts have also raised their price targets, with several assigning "buy" ratings, leading to a "Moderate Buy" average rating across the board. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and provided positive guidance for fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: ONEOK plans annual shareholder meeting
feed.summary: ONEOK, Inc. has announced that its 2026 annual shareholder meeting will be held virtually on May 20 at 9 a.m. Central Time. Only shareholders of record as of March 23, 2026, will be eligible to vote, with registration opening on April 1, 2026. The company recently reported strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings, with significant increases in net income and adjusted EBITDA.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (CHD) EVP logs small tax-related stock withholding
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (CHD) Executive Vice President, Rene Hemsey, reported a tax-related disposition of 69 common shares on March 3, 2026. These shares, valued at $103.02 each, were withheld to cover tax obligations arising from the vesting of restricted stock units, and this was not an open-market sale. Following this transaction, Hemsey retains significant direct and indirect holdings in the company.

feed.title: Assessing Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And 2024 Results
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) has seen recent share price momentum, trading at $61.22, yet models suggest it could be almost 50% below its intrinsic value. The narrative indicates a fair value of $65, supported by revenue trends and expected margin recovery, despite a GAAP loss per share in 2024. Investors are encouraged to review the underlying data and potential risks like revenue contraction from older drugs.

feed.title: Philip Morris Donation Highlights Community Ties And Long Term Investor Story
feed.summary: Philip Morris International's U.S. arm has made a significant donation to the California Asian Pacific Chamber of Commerce to support small business growth, particularly for disadvantaged entrepreneurs. This initiative aligns with the company's broader focus on social impact and ecosystem development beyond its core tobacco operations, and while it doesn't change the earnings outlook or core risks, it aids in building relationships and refining brand perception as the company transitions to smoke-free products. Investors should monitor if these partnership activities expand and how they integrate into PMI's overall smoke-free strategy, recognizing that community ties could marginally influence regulatory discussions.

feed.title: McKesson (NYSE: MCK) legal chief sells 2,725 shares at $990
feed.summary: McKesson Corporation's EVP and Chief Legal Officer, Michele Lau, sold 2,725 shares of common stock at $990 per share on March 2, 2026, as reported in a Form 4 SEC filing. The sale was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Following the transaction, Lau directly holds 3,247 shares and indirectly holds an additional 138.5939 shares through her 401(k) plan.

feed.title: Ducommun Record Revenue And Vision 2027 Reaffirmed Despite Quarterly Miss
feed.summary: Ducommun (NYSE:DCO) reported record annual revenue for the third consecutive year, driven largely by its military and space segment, despite a quarterly revenue miss. The company reaffirmed its Vision 2027 goals and highlighted the benefits of ongoing restructuring efforts, positioning itself to capitalize on increased U.S. defense spending. Shares are currently assessed as undervalued, trading about 31.3% below an estimated fair value.

feed.title: Verizon Rose 4% This Week. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go by 2026
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. stock rose 4% this week, closing near $51 per share, driven by renewed interest in high-dividend telecom stocks and management's focus on cash flow improvement and cost discipline. The company's CEO outlined a turnaround strategy emphasizing subscriber growth and operational efficiency, aiming for at least $21.5 billion in free cash flow by 2026. A valuation model suggests a target price of $60 by 2026, implying an 18% upside, predicated on steady revenue growth, improved operating margins, and expansion in fixed wireless broadband.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (NYSE: CHD) EVP reports tax withholding of RSU shares
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (NYSE: CHD) EVP Kevin Gokey reported a tax-related disposition of 40 common stock shares at $103.02 each. These shares were withheld to cover tax obligations incurred when previously granted Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) vested. This was not an open-market sale, and Gokey continues to hold Church & Dwight shares directly and through a savings and profit-sharing plan.

feed.title: Chubb Avoids Covering New York School District Abuse Claim
feed.summary: A federal court has ruled that Chubb Ltd. unit Century Indemnity Co. is not liable for covering a sexual abuse claim against New York's Kendall Central School District. The school district failed to notify the insurer in a timely manner regarding a lawsuit filed under New York's Child Victims Act. This case emphasizes the critical importance for school districts to promptly inform their insurers of any legal claims to avoid denial of coverage.

feed.title: Church & Dwight EVP reports 123-share tax disposition | CHD SEC Filing - Form 4
feed.summary: Church & Dwight executive Patrick D. De Maynadier reported a tax-related disposition of 123 shares of common stock on March 3, 2026, at $103.02 per share. This transaction was to cover tax obligations from vested restricted stock units. Following this, he still holds various direct and indirect positions in Church & Dwight stock.

feed.title: ISRG stock: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG NASDAQ) $504.72 04 Mar 2026, subscription pivot ahead
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) stock is trading at $504.72, up 1.71%, driven by surgical system placements and anticipation of a shift to paid software services for its da Vinci 5 system. The company's fundamentals show strong profitability but a premium valuation, with a key catalyst being the potential for higher-margin recurring revenue from digital subscriptions starting mid-2026. Meyka AI rates ISRG with a B+ (Buy) at 79.74, while analyst consensus is broadly supportive despite a mixed short-term forecast and a long-term projection showing significant upside.

feed.title: NASA's Starliner Mishap Findings Deepen the Governance And Culture Story Around Boeing's (BA) Crewed-Space Program
feed.summary: NASA has formally declared the Starliner Crewed Flight Test a Type A mishap, with findings detailing communication breakdowns, unprofessional behavior, and leadership failures at Boeing. The investigation also cited hardware failures, qualification gaps, and cultural breakdowns inconsistent with NASA's safety standards. This comes after the Starliner mission was extended to 93 days due to propulsion anomalies, and the astronauts eventually returned on a SpaceX vehicle.

feed.title: Director Daniel M. Pope sells 500 Tyler Technologies (NYSE: TYL) shares
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies director Daniel M. Pope sold 500 shares of common stock at an average price of $355.399 per share on March 2, 2026, in an open-market transaction. This sale, reported in a Form 4 SEC filing, leaves him with 2,871 directly owned shares of the company. The transaction is identified as having a negative sentiment due to it being an insider sale.

feed.title: [144] EVERSOURCE ENERGY SEC Filing
feed.summary: Eversource Energy (ES) has filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed sale of 1,400 common shares through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC, with an aggregate market value of $105,000.00. The filing, dated March 4, 2026, details two vesting events for restricted stock awards: 9 shares on February 15, 2025, and 1,391 shares on February 12, 2026, both classified as compensation. This notice serves as an administrative notification of an intended sale and does not describe a completed transaction.

feed.title: Honeywell Aerospace files with SEC for spin-off, reveals executives’ compensation
feed.summary: Honeywell Aerospace has filed with the SEC to become an independent publicly traded company, moving closer to its Q3 spin-off. The filing details the compensation for its post-spin-off leadership, including CEO Jim Currier's $1.4 million annual salary and significant bonuses. Other executives, such as CFO Joshua Jepsen, will also receive substantial salaries, sign-on bonuses, and equity awards.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman’s (NOC) DARC Site 2 Hardware Order Shows the Space Force is Still Building Out GEO Tracking Capacity
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman Corp (NOC) is advancing the Deep Space Advanced Radar Capability (DARC) program for the U.S. Space Force, designed to track satellites in geosynchronous orbit. The Space Systems Command placed a $76.7 million order for long-lead hardware for DARC site 2 in Wales, expected to be completed by 2030. This program aims to provide continuous, all-weather monitoring of objects approximately 22,000 miles above the equator, with a planned global network of three mid-latitude sites.

feed.title: Identity Intelligence, AI Readiness Key Themes Highlighting Verato's Presence at Gartner Data & Analytics Summit 2026
feed.summary: Verato, an identity intelligence company, will showcase its Verato MDM Cloud™ at the Gartner Data & Analytics Summit 2026, emphasizing how identity intelligence is crucial for effective AI, analytics, and Customer 360 initiatives. The company will host a roundtable on healthcare AI and a joint session with Snowflake, focusing on resolving identity within Snowflake to build AI-ready Customer 360 solutions. Verato aims to demonstrate how trusted identity data underpins scalable AI innovation and improved business outcomes.

feed.title: Everything you need to know about Apple's ‘big week' of product launches
feed.summary: Apple has announced a "big week" of product launches, including the new budget-friendly iPhone 17e, the entry-level MacBook Neo, updated iPad Air models running the M4 chip, and refreshed MacBook Pro models with M5 Pro and M5 Max chips. The company also unveiled two new 5K Studio Display monitors. These new products are available for preorder starting Wednesday, aiming to capitalize on recent strong sales.

feed.title: [144] MOODYS CORP /DE/ SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details a Form 144 SEC filing by Moody's Corp (MCO), indicating a proposed sale of securities. The document provides information about the filer, issuer, securities to be sold (Common Stock, 334 units, valued at $157,437.26), and the acquisition details, primarily restricted stock vesting. It also lists recent news and other SEC filings related to Moody's.

feed.title: Target’s turnaround faces execution risks, says Bank of America
feed.summary: Bank of America analysts have maintained their 'Underperform' rating for Target Corp (NYSE:TGT), despite a slight increase in their price target to $106 from $103, reflecting moderately improved margin expectations. While encouraged by Target's strategic investments in people, stores, and merchandise, analysts expressed caution that driving sustainable positive traffic and comparable store sales growth might take longer than the market anticipates. The firm reiterated concerns about intense competition and limited "green shoots" in discretionary spending categories, suggesting that the first quarter of 2026 could be the low point for earnings due to elevated startup costs and SG&A expenses.

feed.title: Ross Q4 sales jump, cites ‘very strong start’ to spring season; to open 110 stores
feed.summary: Ross Stores Inc. reported better-than-expected Q4 earnings and sales, with a 12% increase in total sales and a 9% rise in comparable store sales, driven by strong holiday season performance and increased customer engagement. The company plans to open 110 new stores in 2026, including 85 Ross and 25 DD’s Discounts locations, as it aims for long-term growth and market share expansion. Ross projects positive same-store sales growth and increased earnings per share for the upcoming fiscal year.

feed.title: Ross accelerating store growth in 2026
feed.summary: Ross Stores Inc. plans to significantly increase its store count in 2026, aiming for 5% growth with 110 new units, including 85 Ross Dress for Less stores and 25 dd's Discount locations. CEO Jim Conroy expressed confidence in reaching long-term targets of 2,900 Ross and 700 dd's stores. This expansion follows the opening of 90 new stores in the previous fiscal year, which included new market entries in the New York Metro area and Puerto Rico.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Vistra Price Target to $253 From $250, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has increased its price target for Vistra Corp. to $253 from $250, reaffirming its Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects the firm's continued positive outlook on the integrated retail and electric power generation company. The article also provides recent news about Vistra, including other analyst target adjustments and its Q4 2025 earnings report.

feed.title: Fidelity files Rule 144; LRCX insider sale reported (NYSE: LRCX)
feed.summary: Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC has filed a Rule 144 notice regarding the sale of Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) common stock. The filing reports a sale of 40,329 shares worth $9,284,673.40 on March 2, 2026, associated with Douglas R. Bettinger. Additionally, the notice includes securities to be sold by the issuer related to options granted on March 1, 2023, and March 1, 2024.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum Corp Stock Moved Up by 3.23% on Mar 4: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum Corp (MPC) stock rose by 3.23% on March 4th, driven by escalating geopolitical tensions boosting crude oil prices, strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings that exceeded estimates, and positive analyst "Buy" ratings with an average price target of $200.06. The company also benefits from high refining utilization, widened crack spreads for diesel and jet fuel, and a competitive advantage due to lower natural gas and electricity prices in the U.S.

feed.title: Honeywell Aerospace files paperwork for public company spinoff
feed.summary: Honeywell Aerospace has filed regulatory paperwork for its spin-off from parent company Honeywell International, moving closer to becoming an independent public company. The Phoenix-based aerospace division plans to complete the separation in the third quarter and will trade on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol "HONA." It will maintain its headquarters in Phoenix post-spin-off.

feed.title: Deb Crandall The Clorox Company Fresh Step Uses Valentine’s Insights to Power a Gen Z Brand Reset
feed.summary: Fresh Step launched its "Date Cats, Not Humans" campaign and a brand refresh, targeting Gen Z and millennials who prioritize pets over traditional romantic relationships. Led by Deb Crandall of The Clorox Company, the initiative leverages cultural insights and data to celebrate cat ownership and challenge stereotypes. The campaign also partnered with Best Friends Animal Society to encourage cat adoptions.

feed.title: Executive pay and board elections at Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN)
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) will hold its annual meeting on April 16, 2026, where shareholders will vote on the election of 12 directors, advisory approval of executive compensation, auditor ratification, and a stockholder proposal on written consent. The company's executive compensation structure is performance-based, with bonuses for 2025 increasing by 10% due to 13.0% revenue growth and a 34.1% operating margin, despite a negative total shareholder return. The board recommends against a shareholder proposal advocating for written consent, citing the effectiveness of current governance practices including the right for stockholders to call special meetings.

feed.title: Scotiabank Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) Stock Price
feed.summary: Scotiabank has lowered its price target for Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) from $284 to $278, although it maintains a "sector outperform" rating, suggesting a 9.53% upside. The real estate investment trust's stock has an average "Hold" rating from analysts with a consensus target of $283.31, and the company recently reported a slight miss on quarterly EPS but beat revenue estimates. Institutional investors hold a significant 96.51% stake in the company.

feed.title: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) Stock Price Expected to Rise, Scotiabank Analyst Says
feed.summary: Scotiabank has increased its price target for Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) from $66 to $67, maintaining a "sector perform" rating, which suggests a 7.5% upside. This comes as the company slightly missed Q4 earnings expectations and provided Q1 and full-year 2026 guidance. While the analyst consensus remains a "Hold" with an average price target of $69.74, insider selling totaling over $655,000 has been observed in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) Given New $113.00 Price Target at Scotiabank
feed.summary: Scotiabank has reduced its price target for Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) from $115 to $113, maintaining a "sector perform" rating. The company recently missed quarterly EPS estimates but reported higher-than-expected revenue and authorized a $600 million share buyback. Several other analysts have also adjusted their price targets and ratings for CPT.

feed.title: Bright Minds Biosciences (NASDAQ:DRUG) Stock Price Expected to Rise, HC Wainwright Analyst Says
feed.summary: HC Wainwright has increased its price target for Bright Minds Biosciences (NASDAQ:DRUG) to $145 from $115, maintaining a "buy" rating and suggesting an 82% upside. The company's stock currently trades around $79.60 with a market cap of $774.5 million and an average analyst consensus of "Moderate Buy" with a $124.50 target. This comes after Bright Minds Biosciences reported a quarterly EPS of -$0.70, beating analyst estimates, and is progressing with its lead oral candidate BMB-101.

feed.title: Scotiabank Lowers AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) Price Target to $190.00
feed.summary: Scotiabank has reduced its price target for AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) from $193.00 to $190.00, maintaining a "sector perform" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 7.55% from the previous closing price. The real estate investment trust recently surpassed quarterly earnings estimates with an EPS of $2.85 and revenue of $767.9 million.

feed.title: T-Mobile class action alleges company failed to honor $200 gift card promotion
feed.summary: A T-Mobile customer has filed a class action lawsuit alleging the company failed to provide promised $200 promotional gift cards for new phone lines. The plaintiff, Purya Ghrabeti, claims T-Mobile engaged in false advertising and deceptive practices, leading him and potentially other customers to make purchases based on offers that were not honored. The lawsuit seeks restitution and injunctive relief for a class of California consumers who did not receive promised incentives.

feed.title: Analysts Have Conflicting Sentiments on These Real Estate Companies: BXP (BXP) and CoStar Group (CSGP)
feed.summary: Analysts have issued conflicting ratings for real estate companies BXP and CoStar Group. Morgan Stanley maintained a Hold rating on BXP, while William Blair reiterated a Buy rating on CoStar Group. Despite differing individual analyst sentiments, both companies currently hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, indicating a generally positive outlook.

feed.title: Apple just dropped 6 new products. What are they?
feed.summary: Apple has unveiled six new products in March 2026, featuring a mix of budget-friendly options and powerful upgrades. Key releases include the "budget-friendly" iPhone 17e and MacBook Neo, alongside new iPad Air with M4, and upgraded MacBook Pro and MacBook Air models with M5 chips. Also introduced were the new Studio Display and Studio Display XDR.

feed.title: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP has announced that investors who suffered losses on PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) shares have an opportunity to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made materially misleading statements between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026, regarding its business execution, particularly its Branded Checkout initiatives, and downplayed competitive concerns. Investors have until April 20, 2026, to participate as lead plaintiffs.

feed.title: Amcor Stock: 5% Yield, Buyback Boost and a Quiet Packaging Rebound
feed.summary: Amcor plc (NYSE: AMCR) offers a 5% yield and active share buybacks, positioning it as a steady cash machine for investors seeking defensive plays. Despite muted growth and industry-specific ESG risks from plastic packaging, the company demonstrates stabilizing performance, robust free cash flow, and improved margins, making it an interesting option compared to other US defensives. Analysts generally hold a "Hold" rating, seeing it more as a bond proxy or income-generating asset rather than a high-growth stock.

feed.title: AT&T Joins TGL to Elevate the Fan Experience
feed.summary: AT&T has partnered with TGL as a Founding Partner and Official Connectivity Provider to enhance the fan experience for the primetime men's team golf league. This collaboration aims to deliver a more immersive environment through in-venue technology and digital integrations, leveraging AT&T's network to connect fans with every moment of the game. AT&T's involvement includes designing TGL's connectivity blueprint and sponsoring various fan-facing elements across broadcast and digital platforms.

feed.title: 📀Coinbase and MicroStrategy surge as Trump challenges Wall Street banks
feed.summary: Shares in leading cryptocurrency firms like Coinbase and MicroStrategy surged after former President Donald Trump publicly supported the crypto industry and challenged traditional Wall Street banks. This rally was driven by reports of a private meeting between Trump and Coinbase's CEO, followed by Trump's calls for banks to "make a good deal with the crypto industry" and support for the Clarity Act. The political tailwinds, combined with a recovery in Bitcoin and Ethereum prices, suggest a potential sustained bull market for crypto through 2026, with analysts anticipating a significant influx of institutional capital if regulatory hurdles for stablecoins are overcome.

feed.title: Caterpillar Trades at Premium Valuation: How to Play the Stock?
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (CAT) is currently trading at a premium valuation compared to its industry peers, with a forward price-to-sales ratio above the industry average. While the company reported record revenues in Q4 2025 and has positive long-term growth targets, new investors might find its current price less attractive. Existing shareholders are advised to hold due to strong demand drivers and improving earnings visibility, though tariff pressures are expected to impact margins in 2026.

feed.title: White House to meet defense contractors on boosting weapons output (LMT:NYSE)
feed.summary: The White House is scheduled to meet with major U.S. defense contractors to discuss accelerating weapons production. This initiative aims to help the Pentagon replenish its stockpiles depleted by recent military operations. Companies like Lockheed Martin are expected to be represented at the meeting.

feed.title: CONL ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns NASDAQ:CONL
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the GraniteShares 2x Long COIN Daily ETF (CONL), detailing its key statistics such as AUM, expense ratio, and inception date. It highlights CONL's objective to deliver 2x the daily price return of COIN stock, noting its tactical nature and the need for frequent rebalancing for holdings longer than a day. The analysis also covers its classification, recent performance, and answers frequently asked questions regarding its structure and investment strategy.

feed.title: CLOX Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:CLOX
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview of the Eldridge AAA CLO ETF (CLOX), including its current price, performance metrics, and key financial information. It highlights the fund's investment strategy, which focuses on generating current income and preserving capital by investing in AAA-rated collateralized loan obligations. The article also includes frequently asked questions about ETFs, CLOX's specifics, and technical analysis indicators.

feed.title: iShares MSCI China A ETF (NYSE: CNYA) - Share Price
feed.summary: This article provides the current share price and historical performance data for the iShares MSCI China A ETF (NYSE: CNYA). It details the recent share price movement relative to seven days ago and its opening stock price. The report also includes performance metrics for the current year, last year, and financial years, along with a daily share price history.
